description_long: This is a modern, twin-engine military jet aircraft with a sleek, angular design and a dark, matte exterior. The fuselage is sharply pointed at the nose, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit featuring a tinted canopy. The wings are swept back with multiple hardpoints for external stores, and the tail section includes twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers. The engines are mounted at the rear, with visible afterburner glow, suggesting high-performance jet propulsion. The landing gear is not visible, indicating it is likely retractable and currently stowed. The overall appearance is aggressive and aerodynamic, suitable for high-speed flight.
description: A dark, angular twin-engine military jet with swept wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward-mounted cockpit. The engines emit a visible afterburner glow, and the aircraft has a sleek, aerodynamic profile.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the sharply pointed nose, swept wings, and twin vertical stabilizers, with afterburner glow from the rear engines.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the forward cockpit, wide wingspan with multiple hardpoints, and the aggressive stance of the aircraft.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the swept wings, rear engine glow, and angular tail design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts with bright afterburner glow, twin vertical stabilizers, and the full width of the horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with multiple hardpoints and no visible winglets; moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted with visible afterburners.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with conventional horizontal stabilizers; H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, inferred from design).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely multi-seat.
